creator: hanabana@mail.ru
text:
Port www/firefox35-i18n does not depend on www/firefox35. Due to absence of dependence on upgrading ports with portupgrade tool www/firefox35-i18n port is upgraded before www/firefox35. /usr/local/lib/*firefox3/extensions dir is removed on deinstalling www/firefox35 during upgrade and links to /usr/local/lib/xpi/langpack*@firefox.mozilla.org disappear.

How-To-Repeat: portupgrade -f firefox\*
